content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.18% with mixed sectoral action — Metal/Energy strong, PSU Bank weak. VIX cooling -5%. Book is 60% deployed with several positions showing constructive moves (PNBHOUSING +6.5%, NESTLEIND +1.7%, SUNPHARMA +1.4%, NTPC +1.2%). Priority is trailing SLs to lock gains rather than adding new exposure given deployment hysteresis rule.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23999,
      "nifty_resistance": 24181
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL Rs 1032.38 already locks ~5% profit above entry Rs 984. CMP Rs 1048 retreating from intraday high 1055 (R1 = 1001 already broken to upside). Thesis intact: Q4 PAT +18%, GNPA <1%, dividend hike 60%. SL already at trail level; no change needed — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior — SL already trailed to 1032 (above entry), target 1095 within reach. No-op MODIFY avoided. Let runner play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at fresh 52-week high Rs 1437. Current SL 1418 already at +0.4% breakeven plus. P&L +1.7% — does not yet trigger the +2% trail-to-breakeven rule formally, and SL is already above entry. No-op situation. Submitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Organon acquisition catalyst confirmed — stock surged 1.6% on 5.3x volume to Rs 1761, P&L +1.4%. Tightening SL from 1734 (entry) to 1740 to lock small gain. Target Rs 1830 unchanged. Risk-reward improved as breakout structure forms. Won't trail aggressively yet — leverage/integration risk warrants room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock near 52-week high Rs 414, P&L +1.2%. Tightening SL from 406 to 408 (above entry 404.50) to lock small gain. Sector strong on heatwave demand 256GW, EDF nuclear MoU, Khavda solar COD. Target 425 intact. Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7%, CMP 319.40 vs SL 318. Position barely breakeven; SL is tight at -0.8%. Defensive transmission play near 52-week high. No change — let it test SL or break out. Q4 May 19 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -3.5%, CMP 78.88 vs SL 76.50 (-2.4% from CMP). Q4 results were strong (PAT +35%, GNPA improved sharply), but PSU bank index weak today and Rs 7,500cr equity raise overhang. SL at 76.50 sits below recent support 76.95. Holding with tight stop; if 76.50 breaks, exit triggers automatically."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, P&L -1.7%. Gold corrected from January ATH but long-term thesis (JPM target $5,000) intact. SL at 119 = -3.5% from CMP 123.48, providing portfolio hedge optionality if equity reverses. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.2%, CMP 2312 vs SL 2295 (-0.7% from CMP). Q4 results April 30 (T+2) — binary event with weak Street expectations. SL is tight; let it ride to event. If results disappoint, SL triggers automatically. No need to MODIFY or pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.8%, CMP 1770 vs SL 1775 — SL essentially at current price. Stock made intraday high 1816 then reversed. SL 1775 will likely trigger if any further weakness; that's acceptable as risk is contained. Power cluster already overweight (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + POWERGRID = ~33% of capital). No new trail."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print strong but stock weak today on PSU bank index drag. SL at 76.50 sits below S2 76.95 — let market decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry locking ~5% gain. Target 1095 intact. Let winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge thesis intact; SL provides downside protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry at 1418 vs entry 1412.94. Fresh 52w high. Hold for target 1465."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2295.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary event April 30 in 2 days. Tight SL controls risk; no pre-emptive action needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL from 406 to 408 (above entry 404.50) to lock small gain. Position +1.2% near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1775.00,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater -2.8%; SL 1775 just below CMP 1770 — will trigger soon if weakness continues. Acceptable risk containment."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 1734 (entry) to 1740 to lock small profit on Organon catalyst breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Position near breakeven; tight SL already in place. Hold for Q4 results May 19."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CUB (+4.6% on Q4 +25% PAT, 1:3 bonus) is a clean earnings-driven setup but already moved 8% intraday — wait for pullback to Rs 270-275 zone. SUNPHARMA-led pharma momentum noted; PIRAMALFIN/GLENMARK/RRKABEL/TATACHEM/NLCINDIA all extended — chase risk too high. INDUSTOWER has Jefferies downgrade and bearish MACD — avoid despite gap-up. RELIANCE neutral post-Q4 weakness. TRENT bonus catalyst priced in after 28% April rally.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with three working BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) still pending — these add ~Rs 1.4L of additional pending deployment if all fill, pushing utilization toward the 80% cap. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID = ~Rs 3L = 30% of capital) is at the cluster discipline threshold — TATAPOWER pending BUY would push cluster to ~35%+, which is excessive given correlation. CANCELLING the TATAPOWER pending BUY would be prudent, but it sits at Rs 443 LIMIT and the entry hasn't filled. Will revisit next tick if market retraces. No new entries today — trailing SLs and capital preservation prioritized. Two binary events approaching: HINDUNILVR Q4 (Apr 30) and INDUSTOWER Q4 (Apr 30). Cash buffer Rs 4L (40%) adequate."
}
